name: ONE PIECE バウンティラッシュ - アクションゲーム

detail.description:
ONE PIECE's first full-fledged action game with a team of up to 4 people vs. 4 people
Play online as a team! Cooperative multiplayer! Defeat the enemy team and steal the treasure to win the battle!

If you're a pirate, scramble for it――

- 1 berry in your hand will be the PIECE that decides victory
ONE PIECE's first team battle action with a maximum of 4 players vs. 4 players.
Team strategy is the key to victory, not just the power of one person.
A berry capture battle game that progresses in pe
